narrative.description: Cuphead and Mugman lose a dice game to the Devil and must collect soul contracts from runaway debtors. Players traverse an overworld map of boss and run-and-gun stages, mastering bullet patterns and parries to defeat cartoon bosses and repay the Devil.
narrative.core_loop: Select a stage from the inkwell map, fight multi-phase cartoon bosses or run-and-gun levels, parry pink objects for super meter and dodge bullet patterns, earn grades and coins, purchase charms and weapons, and collect all soul contracts.

mechanics.map_notes: Pink objects can be parried for super meter buildup and aerial repositioning; core skill expression.
mechanics.expression: Pink objects can be parried for super meter buildup and aerial repositioning; core skill expression.

mechanics.map_notes: Most content is individual multi-phase boss gauntlets selected from an overworld map.
mechanics.expression: Most content is individual multi-phase boss gauntlets selected from an overworld map.

mechanics.map_notes: Bullet hell formations from bosses define the primary challenge in every encounter.
mechanics.expression: Bullet hell formations from bosses define the primary challenge in every encounter.

mechanics.map_notes: Inkwell Isle maps let players choose boss and run-and-gun stages in flexible order.
mechanics.expression: Inkwell Isle maps let players choose boss and run-and-gun stages in flexible order.

mechanics.map_notes: Three HP by default; damage removes a point; zero HP fails the attempt.
mechanics.expression: Three HP by default; damage removes a point; zero HP fails the attempt.

mechanics.map_notes: Simple Mode reduces boss HP and simplifies patterns for players who want to finish the story.
mechanics.expression: Simple Mode reduces boss HP and simplifies patterns for players who want to finish the story.

mechanics.map_notes: Peashooter and weapons fire in the direction Cuphead faces.
mechanics.expression: Peashooter and weapons fire in the direction Cuphead faces.

mechanics.map_notes: Primary weapon fires immediately on button press.
mechanics.expression: Primary weapon fires immediately on button press.

mechanics.map_notes: Every boss transitions through multiple distinct attack phases.
mechanics.expression: Every boss transitions through multiple distinct attack phases.

mechanics.map_notes: Boss attack sequences are deterministic and learnable through repetition.
mechanics.expression: Boss attack sequences are deterministic and learnable through repetition.

mechanics.map_notes: Snappy run-and-jump movement during run-and-gun stages and boss arenas.
mechanics.expression: Snappy run-and-jump movement during run-and-gun stages and boss arenas.

mechanics.map_notes: Coins buy new weapons, charms, and super arts from Porkrind's shop.
mechanics.expression: Coins buy new weapons, charms, and super arts from Porkrind's shop.

mechanics.map_notes: Parries and successful hits fill a super meter for powerful super art attacks.
mechanics.expression: Parries and successful hits fill a super meter for powerful super art attacks.

mechanics.map_notes: Boss wind-ups and color-coded projectiles telegraph attack timing.
mechanics.expression: Boss wind-ups and color-coded projectiles telegraph attack timing.

mechanics.map_notes: Switch between purchased weapons and equipped charms before each stage.
mechanics.expression: Switch between purchased weapons and equipped charms before each stage.

mechanics.map_notes: Failed attempts restart the boss or stage from the beginning.
mechanics.expression: Failed attempts restart the boss or stage from the beginning.

mechanics.map_notes: Variable jump height for dodging patterns and platforming sections.
mechanics.expression: Variable jump height for dodging patterns and platforming sections.

mechanics.map_notes: Run-and-gun stages include platform hazards alongside enemy fire.
mechanics.expression: Run-and-gun stages include platform hazards alongside enemy fire.

design_intent.player_fantasy: Experience Cuphead through its core run-and-gun loop.
